escribeCodigo: Enter the 8-digit code and your new password.
faq1q: What information can I see on my Home dashboard?
faq1a: On your Home you have your summary of the day. You can see your total earnings, pending appointments, and your average rating.
faq2q: Where do I check the comments left by clients?
faq2a: In the "Reviews" panel you can see your large overall rating and read the opinions of each client in detail.
faq3q: How does the Appointments system work?
faq3a: In Appointments you will see client requests. Each card will show you the day, time, and status of the job.
faq4q: How can I add or modify a service?
faq4a: Go to "My Services". There you have a button to add new services with their name, price, and description, or edit the current ones.
faq5q: How do I set my days off and schedules?
faq5a: Go to "My Schedules". There you can turn on or off the days of the week you work and set your entry and exit time.
faq6q: How can I update my details or description?
faq6a: Go to "My Profile" and press edit. You will be able to change your name, contact phone, and your professional description.
faq7q: How do I communicate with a client?
faq7a: Use the "Chat" module to send messages in real-time to clients to coordinate service details.
faq8q: How do I withdraw my earnings from the application?
faq8a: Your earnings are automatically transferred to the bank account you registered every time you complete a service.
faq9q: What happens if a client cancels at the last minute?
faq9a: If the client cancels when you are already on your way, the system will compensate you with a base rate for the lost time.
cuerpoSoporteCorreo: Hello ProFinder team, I need help with:
cuerpoSoporteWA: Hello ProFinder support, I need help with my Professional account.

escribenosDirectamente: Write to us directly and we will help you instantly.
codigo8Numeros: The code must have exactly 8 numbers.
contrasena8Caracteres: The password must have at least 8 characters.
codigoIncorrectoOExpiro: The code is incorrect or has expired.
enviaremosCodigo: We will send a code to your email to authorize the change.
privacidadSec1Texto: By accessing and using the ProFinder Professional application, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of the terms, you may not use our services. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, with modifications being effective upon posting on the application.
privacidadSec2Texto: As a registered professional, you agree to provide truthful, accurate, and up-to-date information regarding your credentials, experience, and offered services. Additionally, you must fully comply with scheduled appointments and maintain a professional and respectful demeanor at all times with clients who hire you through our platform.
privacidadSec3Texto: ProFinder will process payments made by clients securely. You authorize ProFinder to deduct a service fee or commission of 10% for each job successfully completed through the platform. Net earnings will be automatically transferred to the bank account provided by you within the timeframes established in the payment policies.
privacidadSec4Texto: We respect your privacy and protect your personal data in accordance with applicable data protection laws. The personal information and documents provided will be used exclusively for identity verification, payment processing, and enhancing the application experience. We will never sell your data to third parties.
privacidadSec5Texto: We understand that unforeseen events can occur. In the event of cancellation by the client within 24 hours prior to the service, you will be compensated with a base cancellation fee. If you, as a professional, cancel the service, this may negatively affect your rating and ranking in searches.
privacidadSec6Texto: All content included in the application, such as text, graphics, logos, button icons, and images, is the property of ProFinder or its content suppliers and is protected by international copyright laws. You may not reproduce, duplicate, copy, sell, or exploit any portion of the application without our express consent.

Ve a la sección de Configuración > Segur: Go to the Settings > Security section. There you will find the option to enter your current password and set a new one securely.
¿Cómo agrego un servicio nuevo a mi perf: How do I add a new service to my profile?
Para dar de alta un nuevo servicio, ve a: To register a new service, go to the "Services" tab in your control panel, press the "+" button and complete the form with the title, detailed description and base price.
¿Cómo y cuándo puedo retirar mis gananci: How and when can I withdraw my winnings?
Tus ingresos por citas completadas se re: Your income from completed appointments is reflected on your balance sheet. ProFinder makes weekly cuts and automatically deposits your earnings into the bank account or card you linked in the Payments section.
¿Cómo puedo verificar mi cuenta profesio: How can I verify my professional account?
Para obtener la insignia de \"Verificado: To earn the “Verified” badge, you must upload official identification and documentation supporting your experience in the area. Our team will review it within 48 hours.
¿Qué pasa si el cliente cancela la cita?: What happens if the client cancels the appointment?
Si un cliente cancela con menos de 24 ho: If a client cancels with less than 24 hours notice, 50% of the value of the service will be refunded as compensation. Cancellations with greater advance notice do not have a penalty.
¿Cómo puedo contactar a soporte si tengo: How can I contact support if I have a serious problem?
En la parte superior de esta pantalla en: At the top of this screen you will find a direct button to our WhatsApp chat for quick attention, or an email button for detailed reports. We are available 24/7.
¿Cómo actualizo mi información de perfil: How do I update my profile information?
Ve a la pestaña \"Perfil\" y selecciona: Go to the "Profile" tab and select the "Edit Profile" button to change your photo, name or phone number.
¿Cómo puedo solicitar una cita con un pr: How can I request an appointment with a professional?
Busca al profesionista en la pantalla pr: Look for the professional on the main screen, go to their profile and in the "Schedule Appointment" section, select the date and time you need.
¿Dónde veo si mi cita fue aceptada?: Where do I see if my appointment was accepted?
En la pestaña de \"Citas\" puedes ver to: In the "Appointments" tab you can see all your requests. If the professional accepts, they will go to the "Upcoming Jobs" section.
¿En qué momento puedo usar el chat?: When can I use the chat?
El chat privado se habilita automáticame: Private chat is automatically enabled in the "Chat" tab only when the professional accepts your appointment request.
Tengo un problema técnico, ¿qué hago?: I have a technical problem, what do I do?
Puedes contactarnos directamente desde l: You can contact us directly from the WhatsApp or Email buttons at the top of this screen. We address technical problems 24 hours a day.
En el menú lateral, selecciona \"Perfil\: From the side menu, select "Profile" to update your photo, bio, and other contact information.
¿Cómo agrego un nuevo servicio?: How do I add a new service?
Ve a la pestaña \"Servicios\", pulsa el: Go to the "Services" tab, press the "+" button and fill out the form with the title, description and base price.
¿Cómo acepto o rechazo una solicitud de: How do I accept or reject an appointment request?
En la pestaña \"Solicitudes\" verás las: In the "Requests" tab you will see the pending appointments. Open the details of each customer and use the "Accept" or "Reject" buttons.
¿Cómo indico que ya terminé un trabajo?: How do I indicate that I have already finished a job?
Entra al detalle de la cita aceptada en: Enter the details of the accepted appointment in your calendar and change its status to "Completed".
¿Cómo funciona el chat con el cliente?: How does chat with the client work?
Al aceptar una solicitud de cita, se abr: Upon accepting an appointment request, a private chat will open in the "Chat" tab to coordinate the latest details.
